notes: Data sources: nursing-homes/ static pages (JSON-LD fragments up to 500 chars), data.js GROUPS registry. External website fetch blocked in this environment — Noble Care website referenced by domain only. Old editorial lengths are lower-bound estimates (JSON-LD truncates at 500 chars; full sheet editorials estimated ~1800–2500 chars based on Johor EHA sample). Amazing Grace entries removed from this batch — already covered in 2026-05-03-batch_2.json.

facilities.title: Attia Nursing Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Nursing Care Centre is the founding branch of the Attia Care Centres group, located in the Taman Wahyu area near Jalan Ipoh in northern Kuala Lumpur. Attia Care Centres has been operating nursing homes in the Klang Valley since 2011 and has since expanded to multiple branches across the Klang Valley and Ipoh. The group's founding focus centred on medically complex and post-acute cases — including stroke rehabilitation, high-dependency nursing, and post-surgical recovery — rather than straightforward residential aged care.

This branch is part of the Attia group's network, which caters primarily to Muslim elderly residents. All Attia branches serve Halal-certified meals and incorporate Islamic daily activities into the routine, creating an environment aligned with the cultural and religious expectations of Muslim families. The Taman Wahyu location places it within the northern Kuala Lumpur residential belt, in the Jalan Ipoh corridor that connects Sentul to the Ring Road — an area with good road access to Hospital Kuala Lumpur and several private hospital options along Jalan Ipoh.

Pricing for this branch is not published publicly — contact the Attia group directly to request a written fee schedule. The Jalan Ipoh corridor is a practical location for families in northern KL and those commuting from the Batu Caves or Kepong areas. Families should confirm the specific address, current care scope, bed availability, and overnight nursing arrangements directly with the operator before visiting. Ask to confirm the JKM licence, and ask which allied health services — physiotherapy, occupational therapy, wound care — are available on-site, as these are important for residents with ongoing rehabilitation or high-dependency nursing needs.

facilities.title: Attia Global Care Klang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Global Care Klang is the most-reviewed branch in the Attia Care Centres network, located at Jalan Raja Bot in central Klang — a main commercial artery in Klang town with proximity to Hospital Tengku Ampuan Rahimah, the primary public referral hospital for the Klang district. Attia Care Centres has operated since 2011 with an original focus on medically complex and post-acute cases, including stroke rehabilitation and high-dependency nursing, and the Klang branch reflects this positioning as a clinical nursing home rather than a basic residential facility.

Like all Attia branches, this home serves primarily Muslim elderly residents with Halal-certified meals, Islamic daily activities, and an environment attuned to the cultural and religious practices of Muslim families. The group operates across multiple branches in the Klang Valley and Ipoh under a shared care model. The Klang branch carries 77 Google reviews at 4.7 stars — a meaningful sample for a nursing home of this size in this segment, with reviewers noting responsive clinical management and attentive care staff. Pricing is not published on the operator website; contact the branch for a current fee schedule and room availability.

Jalan Raja Bot is a central Klang address with direct road access to the Klang–KL expressway network, reachable from Shah Alam, Petaling Jaya, and the broader Klang Valley. This branch is a strong option for Muslim families in the Klang area seeking a nursing home capable of managing post-stroke rehabilitation, complex wound care, or other medically intensive care needs. When visiting, ask specifically about the doctor visit schedule, registered nurse overnight coverage, and which allied health services — physiotherapy, occupational therapy, wound management — are available on-site and included in the base rate.

facilities.title: Attia Global Care Centre (Subang Jaya)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Attia Global Care Centre Subang Jaya is located at No. 7, Jalan SS 19/2 in the SS19 neighbourhood of Subang Jaya — the same established residential precinct as the nearby Amazing Grace Senior Home. As part of the Attia Care Centres group that has operated since 2011, this branch applies the group's focus on post-acute and medically complex care to the Subang Jaya catchment. Available information describes the Subang Jaya location as taking a somewhat more homely and residential character compared to the more clinically intensive Klang flagship.

Like all Attia branches, the Subang Jaya home serves primarily Muslim elderly residents, with Halal-certified meals, Islamic daily programming, and an environment aligned with the cultural and religious expectations of Muslim families. The facility is air-conditioned throughout. With 24 Google reviews at 4.5 stars, this branch has a smaller but consistently positive reviewer base. Pricing is not published on a public operator website; request a written fee schedule directly from the branch.

The SS19 address provides good road access to the PJ–Subang highway network and is within range of Subang Jaya Medical Centre and KPJ Damansara Specialist Hospital — useful for residents with ongoing specialist appointments. Ask to confirm the JKM licence and current staffing levels when visiting. This branch suits Muslim families in the Subang Jaya–Petaling Jaya area who need a managed residential nursing environment, particularly for residents who benefit from a culturally familiar Islamic setting. Verify the specific clinical capabilities — overnight nursing coverage, doctor visit schedule, and allied health availability — before committing to admission.

facilities.title: Noble Care (Tampoi, Johor Bahru)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care's Johor Bahru branch is located at 17 Jalan Tan Hack Kiat, off Jalan Tampoi, in the industrial-residential Tampoi zone south of JB city centre. Noble Care (M) Sdn. Bhd. (company registration 201001020128) is one of Malaysia's larger private nursing home chains, with 16-plus branches spanning the Klang Valley, Penang, Ipoh, Seremban, and Johor Bahru. The JB branch represents the group's primary presence in the Johor market.

Noble Care operates under a standardised care model across its network, covering 24-hour nursing care, dementia care programmes, and rehabilitation services. This shared framework means families can expect consistent service categories across branches, though quality of execution varies by location — individual branch ratings across the Noble Care network range considerably, and families are advised to assess each branch independently. The group's full service overview is available at mynoblecare.com. Pricing is not listed on the Noble Care website; contact the JB branch directly for a current fee schedule and bed availability.

Jalan Tampoi has trunk road access connecting to the JB expressway network, and the branch is approximately 10–15 minutes from Hospital Sultanah Aminah, Johor Bahru's main public referral hospital — useful context for families managing ongoing specialist care needs. Noble Care is an established chain with an operator website at mynoblecare.com where families can review the group's care model before visiting. At the branch, ask specifically about the current staffing structure, the doctor visit schedule, and how dementia residents are managed day-to-day — branch-level execution is worth verifying independently of the chain-level framework.

facilities.title: Noble Care Malaysia Ampang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Malaysia Ampang is at 537 Jalan 5, Taman Ampang Utama, Ampang, Selangor — a long-established residential neighbourhood with unusually strong hospital access for a nursing home of this type. Hospital Ampang is approximately five kilometres away, and Gleneagles Hospital Kuala Lumpur is reachable within around fifteen minutes, making this one of the better-positioned Noble Care branches in the Klang Valley for families managing residents with regular specialist outpatient appointments or the possibility of acute admissions.

Noble Care operates a standardised care model across its 16-plus branches nationally, covering 24-hour nursing care, dementia care programmes, and rehabilitation services. The group has operated since around 2005 under Noble Care (M) Sdn. Bhd. (registration 201001020128), making it one of the longer-established private nursing home chains in Malaysia. The group's service framework and branch directory are published at mynoblecare.com. Pricing is not listed on the Noble Care website; contact the Ampang branch directly for a current fee schedule.

The Taman Ampang Utama address gives good road access to the Ampang–KL arterials and the AKLEH highway. With 8 Google reviews at 4.0 stars, the Ampang branch has a smaller public sample compared to some Noble Care locations — which means first-hand referrals from existing families or a medical social worker recommendation carry particular weight when assessing fit. When visiting, ask about the day and overnight staffing ratios, doctor visit schedule, dementia unit arrangement, and current bed occupancy. Noble Care's standardised model provides a chain-level baseline, but verifying branch-level execution in person is especially important where the public review trail is limited.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home Klang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Nursing Home Klang is at 46-B Lorong Baling, Kawasan 18, in the older industrial-residential fringe of Klang town. The branch was established in 2012 according to the Noble Care operator website, making it one of the earlier Klang Valley additions to the Noble Care network. Kawasan 18 is a functional commercial zone rather than a residential setting, but the branch is described as a full nursing home positioned to handle clinically complex cases rather than basic residential aged care — a distinction that matters for families with high-acuity residents.

Noble Care operates a standardised care model across its 16-plus branches, covering 24-hour nursing care, dementia care programmes, and rehabilitation services. Noble Care (M) Sdn. Bhd. (registration 201001020128) has been operating since around 2005, and the group's full service details are available at mynoblecare.com. Pricing is not listed on the Noble Care website; contact the Klang branch directly for a current fee schedule. The branch carries 11 Google reviews at 4.6 stars — a small but consistently positive reviewer base.

Kawasan 18 is close to central Klang and within reasonable reach of Hospital Tengku Ampuan Rahimah, the main public hospital for the Klang district. For families with a resident requiring complex nursing care — stroke rehabilitation, wound management, PEG feeding, or other medically intensive interventions — ask specifically whether the Klang branch currently carries the staffing capacity for those needs. Also confirm the overnight RN coverage and the doctor visit schedule. Noble Care's chain-level framework describes the service categories; the branch visit is where you verify whether the current staffing at this specific location can meet a given resident's clinical requirements.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home (Jalan Ipoh, KL)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Nursing Home on Jalan Ipoh is at 27 Jalan Cumarasami, off Jalan Ipoh, 51100 Kuala Lumpur, in the older street network just south of Sentul. The branch is part of Noble Care Malaysia, which the operator states was established in 2005 as a family-run eldercare group and has grown to approximately 18 branches nationally — with a concentration in the Klang Valley and extended coverage in Johor, Ipoh, Negeri Sembilan, and Penang. Noble Care (M) Sdn. Bhd. is registered under company number 201001020128.

Noble Care operates a standardised care model across its branches, covering 24-hour nursing care, dementia programmes, and rehabilitation services. The group's full service overview and branch directory are available at mynoblecare.com. Pricing is not listed on the Noble Care website; contact the Jalan Ipoh branch for a current fee schedule. As with all Noble Care branches, the chain-level model provides a consistent service framework, though execution and staffing levels vary across individual locations.

The Jalan Ipoh corridor is within reach of Hospital Kuala Lumpur — the main national referral centre — and several private hospital options along the Jalan Ipoh and Sentul stretch. The branch carries a small public review trail, which is typical for a branch in this type of established residential-commercial area. When visiting, ask about the day and overnight staffing structure, the doctor visit frequency, how dementia residents are managed, and what clinical procedures — wound care, catheter management, PEG feeding — the branch can accommodate. The branch visit is where families should verify which capabilities are currently operational, not just what the chain-level model describes.

facilities.title: Noble Care Retirement Home (USJ 18)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care's USJ 18 branch is at 1 Jalan USJ 18/3 in the USJ township, Subang Jaya — a well-connected residential area roughly equidistant between the Sunway corridor and the USJ commercial belt. USJ 18 is a mature neighbourhood with established road links to the LDP, Federal Highway, and the Shah Alam Expressway, which simplifies both family visits and medical transport logistics for residents. The branch is part of Noble Care (M) Sdn. Bhd. (registration 201001020128), one of Malaysia's larger private nursing home chains with 16-plus branches nationally.

Noble Care operates a standardised care model across its network, covering 24-hour nursing care, dementia programmes, and rehabilitation services. The group's service overview and branch information are available at mynoblecare.com. Pricing is not listed on the Noble Care website; contact the USJ 18 branch directly for a current fee schedule. The USJ 18 location serves the dense residential communities of the southern Klang Valley, an area with sustained demand for eldercare services.

Sunway Medical Centre is in the nearby Sunway corridor — one of the Klang Valley's stronger private hospital options for residents requiring specialist outpatient care or acute support. This branch does not currently carry a significant public review trail, making first-hand referrals from existing families or medical social workers especially valuable when assessing fit. When visiting, ask about current bed availability, overnight nursing coverage, the doctor visit schedule, and whether the branch accepts residents with complex nursing needs such as dementia or post-stroke care. Noble Care's chain-level model provides a starting reference; the branch visit is where you confirm the current operational reality.

facilities.title: Pearl Care Elderly Center Sdn. Bhd.
facilities.editorial_summary:
Pearl Care Elderly Center Sdn. Bhd. is located in Seksyen 12, Petaling Jaya, within the Jalan Kemajuan residential corridor. Incorporated in August 2020 (registration 1379500H), Pearl Care has grown into a multi-branch operator with homes across PJ Sections 5, 11, 12, 12A, and Sunway — an unusually concentrated footprint for an operator of this age, reflecting strong local demand for eldercare in the mature residential neighbourhoods of Petaling Jaya.

The branch carries 16 Google reviews at 4.9 stars — a strong score across its reviewer base. The operator does not appear to maintain a chain-level website, which means families should assess this branch through direct contact and a visit rather than relying on online materials. Pricing is not published publicly; request a written fee schedule when you enquire, and ask specifically about which care types are offered — particularly whether the branch handles bedridden residents, dementia cases, or post-surgical recovery — as this clarifies whether the clinical level matches the prospective resident's needs.

Seksyen 12 has good road access to PJ's main arterials, and the area sits within reasonable distance of University Malaya Medical Centre (PPUM) and Assunta Hospital — two of PJ's strongest hospital referral options. Ask to see the JKM licence and registration category during your visit, as this confirms the permitted scope of care and the minimum required staffing ratios. For families prioritising a care home within the established Petaling Jaya residential belt with a strong recent review record, Pearl Care Elderly Center is worth including in your shortlist — though verifying the clinical capabilities in person is important given the limited public information currently available about this operator.

facilities.title: Pearl Care Elderly Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
Pearl Care Elderly Home's Seksyen 12 branch is on Jalan 12/16, Petaling Jaya — a quiet residential pocket of central PJ that sits within convenient distance of both University Malaya Medical Centre (PPUM) and Assunta Hospital, two of the Klang Valley's strongest hospital options for residents requiring regular specialist follow-up or potential acute care support. Pearl Care operates as a multi-branch operator across Petaling Jaya, with homes in Sections 5, 11, 12, 12A, and Sunway — a tightly clustered network that covers much of the residential catchment of central PJ.

With 62 Google reviews at 4.6 stars, this branch has one of the larger reviewer bases in the Pearl Care network and a consistent pattern of positive feedback. The Seksyen 12 setting gives it a quiet, residential character that many families prefer over facilities located in commercial or industrial zones. The operator does not appear to maintain a chain-level website, so families should make direct contact and arrange a visit to understand the specific services, room options, and fee structure. Pricing is not published publicly; request a written quote when you call.

The proximity to PPUM and Assunta Hospital is a genuine practical advantage for families whose resident requires specialist outpatient monitoring — PPUM in particular is well suited for complex medical cases. Ask to see the JKM licence on your visit, and ask about the staffing ratios for day and overnight shifts, the doctor visit schedule, and whether the branch handles nursing-intensive needs such as PEG feeding, catheter care, or wound management. For families already placed with a Pearl Care branch elsewhere in PJ, this Seksyen 12 home is a straightforward transfer option within the same operator network.
